original: The beast slams into you head-first, its thick skull-plate acting like a battering ram that sends you flying against the cavern wall. You yelp in pain as the rib-cracking attack lands, and leaves you rolling in agony on the floor.
You put up your dukes and block the punch, deflecting the beast’s mighty blow!
Pow, right in the kisser! You stagger back under the massive weight of the blow
, and suddenly find yourself tripping on a rocky outcropping. You’re knocked prone
You punch the bastard right in the nose, sending the beast tumbling back away just before it can bite into you!
The hound bites your arm, bringing its jaws down around you with crushing weight. You yelp in pain as its fangs sink into you!
When the creature pries itself off of you, you watch in horror as blood spurts from the wound. You’re bleeding!

This huge, muscular creature has a slavering maw full of razor-sharp fangs, and walks on four legs in an almost gorilla-like gait. The hound’s claws dig into the earth, clattering across the stone and echoing through the cavern. Glowing blue eyes look you over with a bestial, hungry intelligence.
Claws scrabbling, the wetra slips away from your attack.
The hounds thick hide soak up your attack.

You tumble out of the way as quick as you can, letting the hound’s momentum carry it past you. Its head slams into a wall with what should have been lethal force... but the beast just shakes it off and whirls around, ready to keep fighting!
